name: tl-telar
description: Agentic engineering framework for cross-platform apps: mobile (React Native, Flutter), web (Astro, Next.js, TanStack), Rust services, and desktop - 47 agents, 118 skills, 23 commands, 4 hooks, 7 rules, 29 scripts

interface.longDescription: Telar packages mobile, web, and backend engineering workflows as Codex skills: planning, implementation, review, release, orchestration, and specialist guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use Telar to plan a mobile app feature.
Review this code with Telar guidance.
Create a release checklist with Telar.
